page.content: In the Roche Holdings clinical trial enrollment rates and regulatory approval timelines report for March 2025, the data reveals a comprehensive overview of trial phases and their respective metrics. In Table 1, the headers TrialPhase, EnrollmentRate, and GeographicalArea are outlined. The values for OngoingTrials indicate 10 total, with PhaseI at 5, PhaseII at 15, and PhaseIII at 20. CompletedTrials show 30 total, with PhaseI at 3, PhaseII at 12, and PhaseIII at 15, while ExpectedEnrollment stands at 1000.

page.content: TotalEnrollment records 950, with contributions from PhaseI at 200, PhaseII at 300, and PhaseIII at 500. WithdrawnParticipants total 50, with PhaseI at 10 and PhaseII at 20. The EnrollmentRates for PhaseI is 50%, PhaseII is 65%, and PhaseIII is 75%. In Table 2, the headers DrugName, ApprovalStatus, ApprovalDate, ReviewPhases, Category, Phase1, Phase2, Phase3, TotalDays, Cost(CAD), MarketPotential, and Comments are listed.

page.content: Roche-101 is Approved as of 2025-03-15, classified under Clinical in Oncology, with a total review of 120 days and a cost of $5M. Roche-102 remains Pending with N/A for approval date, categorized as Pre-clinical in Immunology. Roche-103 is Rejected on 2025-02-01, Clinical in Neurology, taking 80 days at a cost of $2M. Roche-104 is Approved as of 2025-01-10, Clinical in Cardiology, taking 150 days at a cost of $6M. Roche-105 is Withdrawn, listed as Pre-clinical in Endocrinology, with N/A for approval date.
